message:
feat(rich_rust): enhance console, logging, traceback, and add property tests

Comprehensive improvements across multiple modules to enhance terminal rendering
quality, logging flexibility, and test coverage.

Console improvements (src/console.rs):
- Enhanced terminal capability detection for color support levels
- Improved line wrapping with proper Unicode grapheme handling
- Better cursor position tracking for complex layouts
- Console options for force_terminal, force_color, width override

Filesize formatting (src/filesize.rs):
- Human-readable file size formatting (KB, MB, GB, TB)
- Binary (1024) and decimal (1000) unit systems
- Precision control for decimal places
- Proper pluralization of units

Live display (src/live.rs):
- Improved refresh rate handling with configurable intervals
- Better screen clearing for partial updates
- Support for vertical_overflow handling
- Transient display mode for progress indicators

Logging enhancements (src/logging.rs):
- RichHandler for styled log output with timestamps
- Level-based colorization (DEBUG=cyan, INFO=green, WARN=yellow, ERROR=red)
- Path and line number display for log origin
- Configurable date/time formats
- Markup support in log messages
- Log filtering by level

Layout improvements (src/renderables/layout.rs):
- Simplified ratio calculation removing redundant code
- Better handling of nested layout measurement

Table fixes (src/renderables/table.rs):
- Minor rendering fix for border alignment

Traceback rendering (src/renderables/traceback.rs):
- Full traceback formatting with syntax highlighting
- Stack frame display with file path, line number, function name
- Source code context with line numbers
- Exception type and message formatting
- Chained exception support (__cause__, __context__)
- Customizable theme integration

Theme improvements (src/theme.rs):
- Streamlined theme color definitions
- Better default contrast ratios
- Consistent color naming

Test infrastructure (tests/common/):
- Platform-specific test helpers for cross-platform testing
- Validation utilities for output verification

Property tests (tests/property_tests.rs):
- QuickCheck-style property tests for rendering invariants
- Style composition property tests
- Color blending property tests
- Layout constraint satisfaction tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
